nasb.text: choosing rather to endure ill-treatment with the people of God than to enjoy the passing pleasures of sin,

esv.text: choosing rather to be mistreated with the people of God than to enjoy the fleeting pleasures of sin.

cnv.text: 他寧願選擇和　神的子民一同受苦，也不肯享受罪惡中暫時的快樂。

ccb.text: 宁愿与上帝的子民一同受苦，也不肯享受一时的罪中之乐。

csbs.text: 他宁愿选择与神的子民同受虐待，也不愿享受暂时的罪中之乐。
